narrative:
Eagle (precinct in Hancock County) has 808 registered voters, with 33.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 63.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 59.4 percentage points.
